description:
A turnkey commercial entity for agents that enables builder teams to combine development and early commercial activity under a single legal structure. It serves as a coordination hub for contributors and customers, enabling teams to process revenues and expenses, contract with customers, and manage early sales without incurring in structural overhead.

Typical Use Cases

- Early products moving from grants to revenue
- Teams testing initial commercial demand
- One‑entity setups before fundraising or regulatory complexity

Suitable for Early‑stage teams with no external funding and limited regulatory exposure, where simplicity outweighs structural separation.

**Capabilities**

✅ Receive income in crypto as grants or donations

✅Pay and hire contributors

✅Pay out dividends

✅Issue shares, security tokens, and receive external investment

✅Getting a bank account

✅Public Registry requirement

🟨International Team (founding team may be abroad, but a local Director is  required)

🟨Tax optimization

🟨Shareholder anonymity (depends on final entity type)
setupServices: Legal document assembler for setting up a commercial entity and Contributor Agreements *(entity wind-down document assembler included)
Kick off meeting with Powerhouse and workshop with local Counsel
Legal entity founding meeting and legal document review with local counsel  *(Tier 1: access to x hours of counsel)
Onboarding assistance with payment processor, accounting software and billing setup
Legal entity domicile and Tax ID
summary: A single legal entity to build, commercialize, and operate a product from day one.
title: Commercial Operational Hub
